auth.name: Izina
auth.loginFailed: Kwinjira byanze. Ongera urebe imyirondoro yawe.
auth.passwordLength: Ijambo ryibanga rigomba kugira nibura inyuguti 6.

dashboard.title: Koresha imishahara, ucunge abakozi, kandi ubone ubufasha bw'umufasha wawe.
dashboard.description: SmartPayRW igufasha kwinjira, kubika amakuru y'abakozi, gukurikirana imishahara, no kubona ibisubizo byihuse.
dashboard.demoNotice: Amakuru nyayo y'imbonerahamwe ntaboneka, SmartPayRW irerekana imibare y'igerageza.

readiness.authDescription: Ifishi zo kwinjira no kwiyandikisha zihujwe na seriveri.
readiness.routesDescription: Amapaji y'ingenzi asaba ko ubanza kwinjira.
readiness.aiDescription: Ubutumwa bwoherezwa kuri seriveri kugira ngo butunganywe neza.

payments.title: Saba kwishyura
payments.description: Tangirira ku igerageza, urebe ko inzira ikora, nyuma ukoreshe serivisi nyazo igihe mwiteguye.
payments.validation: Shyiramo amafaranga na nomero ya telefoni ikora.
payments.simulationMessage: Igerageza ryakozwe. Banza ukoreshe iyi nzira mbere yo gufungura kwishyura nyako.
payments.summaryCopy: Umukiriya abona ubutumwa bwo kwishyura kuri serivisi wahisemo.

chat.initialMessage: Muraho, ndi umufasha wa SmartPayRW. Mbaza ku gukora imishahara, amakuru y'abakozi, imisoro, cyangwa kubahiriza amategeko.
chat.title: Baza umufasha
chat.description: Baza ku mishahara, abakozi, imisoro, cyangwa uko wakurikiza amategeko.
chat.placeholder: Baza ku kubara imishahara, abakozi, PAYE, cyangwa kubahiriza amategeko...
chat.fallback: Ntibyakunze kugera ku mufasha wa SmartPayRW. Ongera ugerageze mu kanya.
chat.emptyResponse: Umufasha yasubije, ariko nta butumwa bugarutse.

local.backendNotice: Seriveri y'umufasha ntiboneka, SmartPayRW ikweretse igisubizo cy'igerageza.
local.obligationsAnswer: Inshingano z'umukoresha mu Rwanda akenshi zirimo kwiyandikisha kuri PAYE, gukata PAYE y'abakozi, gukata pansiyo n'umusanzu w'ikiruhuko cyo kubyara, gukusanya CBHI ku mushahara usigaye, kwishyura imisanzu y'umukoresha ya pansiyo, ikiruhuko cyo kubyara n'impanuka z'akazi, kwita ku bwishingizi bwa RSSB aho bukurikizwa, gutanga imenyekanisha rihuriweho rya PAYE/RSSB, no kubika inyandiko z'imishahara.
local.runPayrollAnswer: Kugira ngo ukoreshe imishahara neza: banza wemeze amakuru y'abakozi n'inyungu zisoreshwa, bara umushahara mbumbe usoreshwa, bara PAYE ukoresheje ibyiciro byo mu Rwanda, kata pansiyo, umusanzu w'ikiruhuko cyo kubyara na CBHI by'umukozi, ongeraho inshingano za RSSB z'umukoresha, huza imibare, tanga PAYE/RSSB ku gihe, wishyure unyuze mu nzira zemewe, kandi ubike impapuro z'umushahara n'inyemezabwishyu.
local.tinMissing: Banza wandike kandi usesengure TIN y'ikigo, hanyuma nshobore gusobanura PAYE, RSSB, CBHI n'ibyago by'imishahara bishoboka kuri icyo kigo.

tin.title: Isesengura rya TIN y'ikigo
tin.description: Sesengura TIN y'ikigo kugira ngo ubone inshingano z'imishahara, ibyago bishoboka, n'igereranya ry'ukwezi. Iyo serivisi nyayo itabonetse, SmartPayRW ikoresha amakuru y'igerageza.

obligations.paye: Kata PAYE ku mushahara w'abakozi kandi uyimenyeshe/u yishyure muri RRA bitarenze umunsi wa 15 nyuma y'igihe cy'umusoro.
obligations.pensionEmployee: Kata umusanzu wa pansiyo w'umukozi ungana na 6% by'umushahara mbumbe.
obligations.pensionEmployer: Ishyura umusanzu wa pansiyo w'umukoresha ungana na 6% by'umushahara mbumbe.
obligations.maternity: Koresha umusanzu w'ikiruhuko cyo kubyara ungana na 0.3% ku mukozi na 0.3% ku mukoresha.
obligations.occupationalHazard: Ishyura umusanzu w'impanuka z'akazi w'umukoresha ungana na 2% by'umushahara mbumbe.
obligations.cbhi: Kata CBHI ingana na 0.5% by'umushahara usigaye w'umukozi kandi uyohereze biciye ku mukoresha.
obligations.medicalScheme: Aho ubwishingizi bwa RSSB bukurikizwa, teganya umusanzu wa 7.5% w'umukozi na 7.5% w'umukoresha ku mushahara fatizo.
obligations.unifiedDeclaration: Koresha imenyekanisha rihuriweho rya PAYE/RSSB aho riboneka kandi ubike ibimenyetso by'imishahara.

liabilities.lateSurcharge: Igereranya ry'inyongera ku kwishyura utinze amezi {{months}}: {{amount}}.

tin.askPrompt: Sesengura TIN {{tin}} kandi usobanure inshingano z'imishahara, ibyago, n'intambwe zikurikira zo kubahiriza amategeko.
tin.invalidSummary: TIN {{tin}} ntiyashoboye kwemezwa. Ongera urebe nomero ugerageze.
